item.title: 🧠 Community Wisdom: How AI is changing product operating models, tracking work stress with Whoop, whether you need a portfolio of AI side projects, marketing for tiny teams, and more
[AINews] Fable and Mythos officially too dangerous to release
item.description: Focus: We are in the strangest timeline.

item.title: Shopping with Claude: How to find quality brands, automate returns, and buy things that last 100 years | Nicole Ruiz
item.description: Focus: Lenny's Podcast is covered in a new interview or podcast. The core topic is 'Shopping with Claude: How to find quality brands, automate returns, and buy things that last 100 years | Nicole Ruiz', useful for tracking executive views, AI strategy and product direction.

item.title: #497 – Biggest Mysteries in Physics: Antimatter, Dark Energy & ToE – Don Lincoln
item.description: Focus: Don Lincoln is a particle physicist at Fermilab who has spent decades working at the frontiers of high energy physics. Thank you for listening ❤ Check out our sponsors: https://lexfridman.com/sponsors/ep497-sc See below for timestamps, and to give feedback, submit questions, contact Lex, etc.

item.title: Reiner Pope – Chip design from the bottom up
item.description: Focus: Working up from basic logic gates to why GPUs, TPUs, FPGAs, and the human brain each look the way they do.

item.title: Eric Jang – Building AlphaGo from scratch
item.description: Focus: AlphaGo is still the cleanest worked example of the primitives of intelligence: search, learning from experience, and self-play.

item.title: [AINews] Loopcraft: The Art of Stacking Loops
item.description: Focus: a quiet day lets us highlight a great concept from Peter Steinberger, Boris Cherny, and Andrej Karpathy

item.title: David Reich – Why the Bronze Age was an inflection point in human evolution
item.description: Focus: "Instead of being quiescent, natural selection is everywhere."

item.title: How to Stop Shipping Low-Quality RL Environments (with Examples)
item.description: Focus: Your broken harness is actively making the model worse. Here's what I keep seeing after years of eyeballing trajectories, and what you need to fix.

item.title: Claude Fable 5 access suspended on AI Gateway
item.description: Focus: In compliance with the US Government's directive , access to Claude Fable 5 is now suspended on AI Gateway for all users. We do not know if or when access to the model will be restored. You can still access and use other Anthropic models through AI Gateway.

item.title: Program Claude Code, Codex, Pi and other agent harnesses with AI SDK
item.description: Focus: AI SDK 7 introduces HarnessAgent , a single API for running established agent harnesses, including Claude Code, Codex, and Pi. AI SDK has always let you switch models without rewriting your agent. Now you can switch the harness the same way. Write the agent once. Use the best harness availabl

item.title: Vercel plugin is now available in Grok Build
item.description: Focus: The Vercel plugin is now available in Grok Build. Grok can now draw on Vercel knowledge as you work. Real-time activity, including file edits and terminal commands, dynamically injects the relevant knowledge into context, so answers stay aligned with current platform APIs and recommended patt

item.title: AIがAIを作る：Sakana AI「RSI Lab」始動
item.description: Focus: Sakana AI has a new AI-related update around 'AIがAIを作る：Sakana AI「RSI Lab」始動', relevant to product, industry or technical direction.

item.title: 金融領域の業務をAIエージェントで変える：Sakana AI、Software Engineerインタビュー
item.description: Focus: Sakana AI has a new AI-related update around '金融領域の業務をAIエージェントで変える：Sakana AI、Software Engineerインタビュー', relevant to product, industry or technical direction.

item.title: Sakana AI、一般社団法人DEEP DIVEとAIを活用した情報分析に関するパートナーシップを締結

item.title: DiffusionBlocks: Training Neural Networks One Block at a Time
item.description: Focus: Sakana AI Blog has a new AI-related update around 'DiffusionBlocks: Training Neural Networks One Block at a Time', relevant to product, industry or technical direction.

item.title: Sparser, Faster, Lighter Transformer Language Models
item.description: Focus: Sakana AI Blog has a new AI-related update around 'Sparser, Faster, Lighter Transformer Language Models', relevant to product, industry or technical direction.
